meta_title: Man and Van Horsham - Mark Ratcliffe Moving and Storage
meta_description: Mark Ratcliffe offer a reliable man and van service in Horsham and the surrounding areas. This is perfect for smaller office or flat moves. Our friendly team will make sure your move runs smoothly and you are more than happy with our service.
intro_paragraph: Mark Ratcliffe provide a man and van service as part of their comprehensive moving services to commercial and domestic clients throughout Horsham, Itchingham and Crawley. This service is perfect for when you do not need a fleet of removals vans, and you just require a single man and van. For instance, if you are moving student accommodation, moving flat, moving offices or single item deliveries.

raw_body:
EMAIL US

Man and Van in Horsham

Our Man and Van service is an affordable service which is perfect for smaller moves. Contact us today!

How can we help you today?

Reliable Man and Van in Horsham

Mark Ratcliffe provide a man and van service as part of their comprehensive moving services to commercial and domestic clients throughout Horsham, Itchingham and Crawley. This service is perfect for when you do not need a fleet of removals vans, and you just require a single man and van. For instance, if you are moving student accommodation, moving flat, moving offices or single item deliveries.

When selecting a man and van or removals company to carry out your move, you need to choose one you know you can trust when handling your possessions. We always treat your belongings with care and consideration. We prioritise customer service and professionalism - which is what keeps our customers returning for our other services and giving us superb customer reviews. Read our testimonials to find out what makes us so reputable in the local area. If you select our man and van service, your van will arrive equipped with GPS, loading ramps, furniture covers, and ties to ensure your belongings are kept completely secure in transit. Our drivers are friendly, polite, and uniformed so you know exactly who to expect. They will always go above and beyond to help your move run smoothly. They are all familiar with the local area, knowledgeable of the quickest routes, so your move goes ahead without any delays due to traffic concerns. We are fully trained and insured so you know you are receiving genuine, trusted service.

Man and Van Hire Horsham Rate:

Moving can be expensive - we are proud to offer affordable rates. If you are undertaking a smaller move, an entire removals team and multiple vans may not be necessary. We provide an affordable alternative to smaller moves:

  • ‍Man with Van and working driver - £70 per hour
  • ‍Man and Van with driver only - £50 per hour (you load and unload the van)

Man van prices are inclusive of vat and fuel (within the local area). We understand that not everyone can move on a weekday due to other commitments, we work flexibly so we can even supply our services on weekends or bank holidays.

First Class Removals Horsham

Mark Ratcliffe has years of experience in the removals industry, having begun in the industry in 1982. This has given us realms of experience so we can provide the best service possible. Our 'man and van' team are available for any type of move. We know that no two moves are the same, so we get to know your exact requirements and tailor our service to your moving day. We offer a complete service, from the moment you enquire to the completion of your move, we are here to make the whole process as simple as it can be. This is why we can offer packing and self-storage options should you require these. We even can help if you are moving overseas and need assistance with removals or small baggage shipments. If you would like to get in touch regarding any of our services or just need some advice about your move - contact us here, call us on 01323 848 008, or for your free quote click the "Request a Quote" button at the top of the page.
